title: selago cinerea
intro: Selago cinerea, also known as Grey Carpet or Grey Selago, is a low-growing, spreading succulent plant native to southern Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The plant has been found to have antioxidant, anti-diabetic, and anti-cancer properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving insulin sensitivity, and inhibiting cancer cell growth. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
